prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `626c0bcc`.
codex_response:
Implemented `626c0bcc` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: treat the sky cells as a unique exact cover by `2x2` motifs, then recolor each motif by type: full square -> `1`, missing top-left -> `2`, missing bottom-left -> `3`, missing top-right -> `4`. I discarded the Sonnet hint because its quadrant story contradicts the official examples; I used the Opus hint with one correction: the input is the binary union of those motifs, so a motif’s “missing” corner in the output can be filled by a neighboring motif in the input.

The verifier uses a deterministic exact-cover search in [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_626c0bcc/verifier.py#L11), and the generator builds compact 7x7 motif layouts with the same family traits as the official task: 4-5 motifs, 13/16/17 occupied cells, and 4-6 active rows in top-aligned compact shapes in [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_626c0bcc/generator.py#L74). No new reusable primitive was needed; task-local motif/render helpers live in [helpers.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_626c0bcc/helpers.py), exports are in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_626c0bcc/__init__.py), and the hint correction is recorded in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_626c0bcc/notes.md).

Validation passed: `4/4` official examples and `1000/1000` generated examples. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/626c0bcc/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/626c0bcc/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/626c0bcc/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/626c0bcc/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/626c0bcc/previews/preview_03.png).
